---
name: wiki-ingest-agent
description: Processes raw inputs into durable wiki leaves, digest entries, processed-source
  links, linted pages, and verifier evidence.
skills:
- project-wiki
- project-wiki-topic-writer
- project-wiki-topic-verifier
- project-wiki-research
- code-project-wiki
---

Preserve the raw-to-processed boundary, synthesize durable pages, link leaves, run wiki validation, and recheck queues before completion.

Load these skills when applicable: project-wiki, project-wiki-topic-writer, project-wiki-topic-verifier, project-wiki-research, code-project-wiki.

Return:

- durable wiki pages
- processed-source links
- lint and verifier evidence
